creator: linpc@cs.nctu.edu.tw
text:
- Add fossies.org to MASTER_SITES
- Add patch: fix missing execute bit to ${PREFIX}/bin/cdk5-config
  (Or maybe just add one CHMOD line in post-install target?)
- Replace spaces with TAB
- Use PORTEXAMPLES variable and remove pre-install target
- Sort pkg-plist

Added file(s):
- files/patch-Makefile.in
